channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Railing at top of small incline has been damaged and now poses a serious risk of injury to passing cyclists, 27th May
item.description:
At top of the small hill above the pond. The railing has been damaged, probably by a vehicle. As such it now leans in towards the opposite barrier and presents a significant hazard to cyclists in an already overly-narrow and awkward downhill section. Serious injury to hip or leg is highly likely!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, King George Close, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Pavement is so baddly patched that is almost impossible for anyone with a wheelchair or with a pushchair to use., 27th May
item.description:
Outside number 10/8/6
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holtham Avenue, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Streetname signs need repainting., 27th May
item.description:
The Tallis Road streetname signs on both sides of entrance to Tallis Road need repainting and refreshingmowing and strimming.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trafalgar Drive, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 27th May
item.description:
Noisy Cover Please Lift & Investigate Road Closure (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalism racist, 27th May
item.description:
At the bottom of sunrise avenue where it joins Evesham road there is this, that has been vandalised by right wing racists. I find it offensive, is it possible it could be swapped out please? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges badly overgrown., 27th May
item.description:
The grass verges on both sides of entrance to Tallis Road need mowing and strimming.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trafalgar Drive, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown verges along Glevum Way, along alley by railway line. Dangerous for young children, as well as disabled people, due to overgrown stinging nettles at eye height., 27th May
item.description:
Glevum Way alley, along path next to railway line from Pirton Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 271,273, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
